items.title: Drug Trials Snapshot: NIKTIMVO
items.desc: NIKTIMVO is a drug used to treat adults and children who weigh at least 88.2 pounds (40 kg) with chronic graft-versus-host disease (GVHD) who have received at least two prior treatments (systemic therapy) and required additional treatment.

items.title: Drug Trials Snapshots - LAZCLUZE
items.desc: LAZCLUZE is a kinase inhibitor indicated in combination with amivantamab for the first-line treatment of adult patients with locally advanced or metastatic non-small cell lung cancer (NSCLC).
